title: PolicyApproval
description: Durable, append-only approval record binding a canonical DataRightsPolicyProfile to its content digest and human provenance. Self-contained so a cold process can decide run authority from this record alone.
$comment: There is deliberately no revocation, supersession, expiry, or deletion field. Changed content takes a NEW profile id rather than retargeting an existing approval. Draft 2020-12 cannot express the profileId-matches-embedded-id invariant, which stays native-owned in the Zod schema.

approvedAt.$comment: Pattern rather than "format": date-time so the portable schema validates under a strict Draft 2020-12 checker with no format vocabulary loaded.
